statement: Close warning — Warn user before closing/navigating away when unsaved changes exist. — Affects route guards / beforeunload, dirty state tracking.
affected_modules: src/services/builder.service.ts; src/services/versions.service.ts; autosave hooks; src/utils/export.helpers.ts; src/utils/import.helpers.ts; local cache
ux_impact: User gets protection without feeling locked in.
